creator: admin@vladiom.com.ua
text:
Updated webmin:

root@vladiom:~ # pkg version -v | grep webmin
webmin-1.831                       =   up-to-date with index

The problem is still present ...

root@vladiom:~ # uname -srm
FreeBSD 10.3-RELEASE-p16 amd64

Webmin show:
Local disk space 3.55 TB used, 5.27 TB total

Real size:
root@vladiom:~ # zpool list
NAME    SIZE  ALLOC   FREE  EXPANDSZ   FRAG    CAP  DEDUP  HEALTH  ALTROOT
dc     3.62T  2.45T  1.17T         -    31%    67%  1.00x  ONLINE  -
dc2    1.81T  1.09T   738G         -    20%    60%  1.00x  ONLINE  -
zroot  1.80T   316G  1.49T         -    17%    17%  1.00x  ONLINE  -
